title: hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. boutignyanum
intro: Hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. boutignyanum, a lesser-known subspecies of the Hedysarum hedysaroides plant, is a type of legume native to the mountainous regions of the Western Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat kidney stones and other urological issues, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. boutignyanum include its ability to reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and act as a diuretic to promote urine production. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil for topical application, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns.
